# Alice Smith

## Context
- Lead engineer on the [Widget Theory](../Concepts/Widget Theory.md) project
- Collaborates with [Bob Jones](./Bob Jones.md) on research
- Proposed the [Acme Project](../Ideas/Acme Project.md) as a way to test [Gadget Pattern](../Concepts/Gadget Pattern.md) in production

## Notes
Alice presented at the 2025 conference about emergent patterns in distributed systems.
She argued that [Widget Theory](../Concepts/Widget Theory.md) provides a better framework than traditional approaches.
